mapper.select:
select a.contract_no as contractNo, a.delivery_type as deliveryType, a.delivery_addr as deliveryAddr, a.total_amount as totalAmount, a.total_number as totalNumber, a.contract_time as contractTime, a.our_company_name as ourCompanyName, a.delivery_date_from as deliveryDateFrom, a.delivery_date_to as deliveryDateTo, a.contract_end_time as contractEndTime, t.credit_days as creditCycle, a.contract_status_wx as contractStatus, a.warehouse_number > a.confirm_receive_number as receiptButtonFlag, a.seal_flg as sealFlg, a.warehouse_flg as warehouseFlg, a.dealed_flg as dealedFlg, a.interest_deal_flg as interestDealFlg, a.billed_flg as billedFlg, a.interest_billed_flg as interestBilledFlg, a.confirm_receipt_flg as confirmReceiptFlg, a.orverdur_flg as orverdurFlg, a.pay_full_time as payFullTime, a.id as ctrContractId, IF(a.business_type_dcsx in ('BL','DCSXBL') AND (a.debt_certificate_file_id is NULL OR a.debt_certificate_file_id = '') AND a.confirm_receipt_flg = true, TRUE, FALSE) as needDebtCertificateFlg, a.debt_certificate_file_id as debtCertificateFileId, a1.delivery_addr as deliveryAddrSell, case when (a.delivery_mode = 'SX' and a.settlement_type = '0') then '1' when (a.delivery_mode = 'SX' and a.settlement_type = '1') then '2' when (a.delivery_mode != 'SX' or a.delivery_mode = null or a.settlement_type = null) then '4' else '0' end as serviceType from t_ctr_contract a left join t_wx_company_user_detail c on a.company_id = c.company_id left join ( select GROUP_CONCAT(x.product_cd, x.product_name, x.brand_number) content, x.ctr_contract_id from t_ctr_product x group by x.ctr_contract_id ) d on d.ctr_contract_id = a.id left join t_ctr_contract_rela d1 on d1.sell_contract_id = a.id left join t_ctr_contract a1 on a1.id = d1.buy_contract_id left join t_apply_match_detail t on t.contract_no = a.contract_no where a.contract_type = 'S' and a.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and c.user_id = #{userId} and a.status != 'C'
ORDER BY a.created_date ASC
ORDER BY a.created_date DESC
ORDER BY a.created_date DESC

select a.contract_no as contractNo, a.delivery_type as deliveryType, a.delivery_addr as deliveryAddr, a.total_amount as totalAmount, a.total_number as totalNumber, a.contract_time as contractTime, a.our_company_name as ourCompanyName, a.delivery_date_from as deliveryDateFrom, a.delivery_date_to as deliveryDateTo, a.contract_end_time as contractEndTime, a.contract_end_time as contractRealEndTime, a.pay_full_time as payFullTime, t.credit_days as creditCycle, a.contract_status_wx as contractStatus, a.seal_flg as sealFlg, a.warehouse_flg as warehouseFlg, a.dealed_flg as dealedFlg, a.interest_deal_flg as interestDealFlg, a.billed_flg as billedFlg, a.interest_billed_flg as interestBilledFlg, a.confirm_receipt_flg as confirmReceiptFlg, a.orverdur_flg as orverdurFlg, a.id as ctrContractId, a1.delivery_addr as deliveryAddrSell, case when (a.delivery_mode = 'SX' and a.settlement_type = '0') then '1' when (a.delivery_mode = 'SX' and a.settlement_type = '1') then '2' when (a.delivery_mode != 'SX' or a.delivery_mode = null or a.settlement_type = null) then '4' else '0' end as serviceType,
a.warehouse_amount as warehouseAmount, a.warehouse_number as warehouseNumber, a.dealed_amount as dealedAmount, a.billed_amount as billedAmount, a.sell_content_file_id as fileId, a.invoice_file_id as invoiceFileId, a.amount_file_id as amountFileId, a.warehouse_file_id as warehouseFileId, a.confirm_receive_number as confirmReceiptNumber,
a.breach_days as interestDays, a.breach_amount as interestAmount, a.receive_breach_amount as receiveInterestAmount
from t_ctr_contract a left join t_wx_company_user_detail c on a.company_id = c.company_id left join t_ctr_contract_rela d on d.sell_contract_id = a.id left join t_ctr_contract a1 on a1.id = d.buy_contract_id left join t_apply_match_detail t on t.contract_no = a.contract_no where a.contract_type = 'S' and a.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and c.user_id = #{userId} and a.contract_no = #{contractNo} and a.status != 'C'

select a.product_name as productName, a.brand_number as brandNumber, a.number_unit as unit, a.deal_price as dealPrice, a.deal_number as dealNumber, a.total_price as dealAmount from t_ctr_product a where a.ctr_contract_id = #{ctrContractId} and a.enterprise_id = 44

select a.product_name as productName, a.brand_number as brandNumber, a.number_unit as unit, a.deal_price as dealPrice, a.deal_number as dealNumber, a.total_price as dealAmount, a.factory_name as factoryName, b.quality_standard as qualityStandard, ifnull(a.warehouse_number, 0) * ifnull(a.deal_price, 0) as warehouseAmount, ifnull(a.confirm_receipt_number, 0) * ifnull(a.deal_price, 0) as confirmReceiptAmount from t_ctr_product a left join t_ctr_contract b on a.ctr_contract_id = b.id where a.ctr_contract_id = #{ctrContractId} and a.enterprise_id = 44

select a.service_contract_no as serviceContractNo, a.total_amount as totalAmount, a.our_company_name as ourCompanyName, a.contract_start_time as contractStartTime, a.contract_end_time as contractEndTime, b.credit_cycle as creditCycle, a.rate as rate, b.breach_rate as interestRate, a.file_id as fileId, a.orverdur_flg as orverdurFlg, ifnull(b.service_billed_amount,0) as billedAmount, ifnull(b.receive_service_amount,0) as dealedAmount, c.budget_status as contractStatus, b.breach_amount as interestAmount, b.receive_breach_amount as receiveInterestAmount, b.breach_days as interestDays from t_ctr_contract b left join t_ctr_service_contract a on a.ctr_contract_id = b.id left join t_budget_settlement c on b.id = c.sell_contract_id where b.contract_no = #{contractNo}

select b.id as operationId, b.created_date as createdDate, b.remark as subject from t_ctr_contract a left join t_ctr_contract_ophis b on a.id = b.ctr_contract_id where a.contract_no = #{contractNo} order by a.created_date desc

select a.warehouse_number as warehouseTotalNumber, a.delivery_type as deliveryType, a.delivery_addr as deliveryAddr, (select x.delivery_addr from t_ctr_contract x left join t_ctr_contract_rela y on x.id = y.buy_contract_id where y.sell_contract_id = a.id ) as deliveryAddrSell, a.id as ctrContractId, a.delivery_date_to as deliveryDate from t_ctr_contract a where contract_no = #{contractNo}

select a.apply_no as deliveryId, a.waybill_code as waybillCode, a.warehouse_out_date as deliveryDateFrom, b.product_name as productName, b.brand_number as brandNumber, ifnull(b.deal_price, 0) * ifnull(b.cur_number, 0) as warehouseAmount, b.cur_number as warehouseNumber, a.file_id, b.number_unit as unit, a.confirm_flg from t_apply_delivery_out a left join t_apply_product_detail b on a.id = b.apply_id where contract_id = #{ctrContractId} and apply_type = 'O' and a.status = 'D' order by a.id

select a.code as code, a.waybill_code as waybillCode, a.customer_order_code as customerOrderCode, a.arrive_time as arriveTime from t_zy_call_back_arrive_vehicle a where a.waybill_code = #{waybillCode}

select a.total_number as totalNumber, a.total_amount as totalAmount, a.delivery_type as deliveryType, a.delivery_addr as deliveryAddr, (select x.delivery_addr from t_ctr_contract x left join t_ctr_contract_rela y on x.id = y.buy_contract_id where y.sell_contract_id = a.id ) as deliveryAddrSell, a.id as ctrContractId, a.quality_standard as qualityStandard from t_ctr_contract a where contract_no = #{contractNo}

select a.product_name as productName, a.brand_number as brandNumber, a.factory_name as factoryName, a.deal_price as dealPrice, ifnull(a.deal_number, 0) - ifnull(a.warehouse_number, 0) as dealNumber, (ifnull(a.deal_number, 0) - ifnull(a.warehouse_number, 0)) * ifnull(a.deal_price, 0) as dealAmount, a.number_unit as unit, a.id as ctrProductId, b.quality_standard as qualityStandard, ifnull((select x.warehouse_number from t_ctr_product x left join t_ctr_contract_rela y on x.ctr_contract_id = y.buy_contract_id where y.sell_contract_id = #{ctrContractId} ),0) as deliveryInNumber from t_ctr_product a left join t_ctr_contract b on a.ctr_contract_id = b.id where a.ctr_contract_id = #{ctrContractId}

select a.dealed_amount as dealedTotalAmount, IFNULL(a.total_amount, 0) - ifnull(a.dealed_amount, 0) as undealedTotalAmount, a.id as ctrContractId from t_ctr_contract a where contract_no = #{contractNo}

select a.apply_no as dealedId, a.created_date as dealedDate, a.receive_amount as dealedAmount, a.receive_type as dealedType, a.receive_mode as dealedMode, a.remark from t_apply_receive a where a.contract_id = #{ctrContractId} and status = 'D'

select a.id as dealedId, a.created_date as dealedDate, a.receive_amount as dealedAmount, a.receive_mode as dealedMode, a.remark from t_apply_service_receive a where a.contract_id = #{ctrContractId} and status = 'D'
select a.service_contract_no from t_ctr_service_contract a left join t_ctr_contract b on a.ctr_contract_id = b.id where b.contract_no = #{contractNo}

select a.billed_amount as billedTotalAmount, IFNULL(a.total_amount, 0) - ifnull(a.billed_amount, 0) as unbilledTotalAmount, a.id as ctrContractId from t_ctr_contract a where a.contract_no = #{contractNo}

select a.service_billed_amount as billedTotalAmount, IFNULL(a.service_amount, 0) - ifnull(a.service_billed_amount, 0) as unbilledTotalAmount, b.id as ctrContractId from t_ctr_contract a left join t_ctr_service_contract b on a.id = b.ctr_contract_id where a.contract_no = #{contractNo}

select a.apply_no as billedId, a.deal_amount as billedAmount, a.invoice_no as billedNumber, a.invoice_date as billedDate, a.bank_name, a.bank_account, a.tax_no, a.company_phone as contactPhone, a.contact_person as contactPhone, a.address as contactAddress, a.remark as remark
from t_apply_invoice a where a.contract_id = #{ctrContractId} and status = 'D'

select a.confirm_receive_number as confirmReceiptTotalNumber, a.delivery_type as deliveryType, a.delivery_addr as deliveryAddr, (select x.delivery_addr from t_ctr_contract x left join t_ctr_contract_rela y on x.id = y.buy_contract_id where y.sell_contract_id = a.id ) as deliveryAddrSell, a.id as ctrContractId from t_ctr_contract a where contract_no = #{contractNo}

select a.apply_no as confirmReceiptId, c.delivery_date as deliveryDateTo, b.product_name as productName, b.brand_number as brandNumber, ifnull(b.deal_price, 0) * ifnull(b.cur_number, 0) as confirmReceiptAmount, b.cur_number as confirmReceiptNumber, a.file_id as uploadFileId, b.number_unit as unit, a.remark from t_apply_confirm_receipt a left join t_apply_product_detail b on a.id = b.apply_id left join t_apply_match_detail c on c.contract_id = a.contract_id where a.contract_id = #{ctrContractId} and b.apply_type = 'G' and a.status = 'D' order by a.id;

select a.service_amount as dealedTotalAmount, ifnull(a.service_amount,0) - ifnull(a.receive_service_amount,0) as undealedTotalAmount, a.id as ctrContractId from t_ctr_contract a where contract_no = #{contractNo}

select ROUND(sum(total_amount + interest_amount) / 10000, 2) sumTotalMount, count(*) sumCount from t_ctr_contract where contract_status is not null
and contract_status != 'C' and match_credit_flg = true and business_type = 'ZY-BB' and billed_amount < (total_amount + interest_amount)

if.test: deptIds != null and deptIds.size() != 0 and userIdOrDept == false
deptIds != null and deptIds.size() != 0 and userIdOrDept == false

mapper.select:
select count(*) num,
'今日代采' typeName,
'本月代采' typeName,
ROUND(ifnull(sum(c.total_number), 0),2) tonnes, ROUND(ifnull(sum(c.total_amount), 0)/10000,2) money, #{statisticsType} as statisticsType from t_ctr_contract c where c.contract_status != 'C' and c.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and c.contract_type = 'S' and c.match_credit_flg = false
and date_format(c.seal_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y-%m')
and date_format(c.delivery_date_to, '%Y-%m') = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y-%m')
and date_format(c.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y-%m-%d')
and date_format(c.delivery_date_to, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y-%m-%d')
union all select count(*) num,
'今日赊销' typeName,
'本月赊销' typeName,
ROUND(ifnull(sum(c.total_number), 0),2) tonnes, ROUND(ifnull(sum(c.total_amount), 0)/10000,2) money, #{statisticsType} as statisticsType from t_ctr_contract c where c.contract_status != 'C' and c.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and c.contract_type = 'S' and c.match_credit_flg = true
and date_format(c.seal_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y-%m')
and date_format(c.delivery_date_to, '%Y-%m') = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y-%m')
and date_format(c.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y-%m-%d')
and date_format(c.delivery_date_to, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y-%m-%d')
union all select count(*) num,
'今日自营' typeName,
'本月自营' typeName,
ROUND(ifnull(sum(c.total_number), 0),2) tonnes, ROUND(ifnull(sum(c.total_amount), 0)/10000,2) money, #{statisticsType} as statisticsType from t_ctr_contract c where c.contract_status != 'C' and c.business_type = 'ZY-XS'
and date_format(c.seal_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y-%m')
and date_format(c.delivery_date_to, '%Y-%m') = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y-%m')
and date_format(c.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y-%m-%d')
and date_format(c.delivery_date_to, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y-%m-%d')

select count(*) num,
'本月代采' typeName,
ROUND(ifnull(sum(c.total_number), 0),2) tonnes, ROUND(ifnull(sum(c.total_amount), 0)/10000,2) money, #{statisticsType} as statisticsType from t_ctr_contract c where c.contract_status != 'C' and c.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and c.contract_type = 'S' and c.match_credit_flg = false
and date_format(c.seal_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(#{queryDate}, '%Y-%m')
and date_format(c.delivery_date_to, '%Y-%m') = date_format(#{queryDate}, '%Y-%m')
union all select count(*) num,
'本月赊销' typeName,
ROUND(ifnull(sum(c.total_number), 0),2) tonnes, ROUND(ifnull(sum(c.total_amount), 0)/10000,2) money, #{statisticsType} as statisticsType from t_ctr_contract c where c.contract_status != 'C' and c.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and c.contract_type = 'S' and c.match_credit_flg = true
and date_format(c.seal_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(#{queryDate}, '%Y-%m')
and date_format(c.delivery_date_to, '%Y-%m') = date_format(#{queryDate}, '%Y-%m')
union all select count(*) num,
'本月自营' typeName,
ROUND(ifnull(sum(c.total_number), 0),2) tonnes, ROUND(ifnull(sum(c.total_amount), 0)/10000,2) money, #{statisticsType} as statisticsType from t_ctr_contract c where c.contract_status != 'C' and c.business_type = 'ZY-XS'
and date_format(c.seal_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(#{queryDate}, '%Y-%m')
and date_format(c.delivery_date_to, '%Y-%m') = date_format(#{queryDate}, '%Y-%m')

select date_format(s.seal_date, '%Y-%m') month, ROUND( sum( s.total_amount-b.total_amount-s.transport_amount-b.transport_amount-s.warehouse_amount-b.warehouse_amount -s.stevedorage-b.stevedorage-s.delivery_fee-b.delivery_fee )/sum(b.total_amount)*100, 2 ) rate, ROUND(SUM(b.total_amount)/10000, 6) buyTotalAmount, ROUND( sum( s.total_amount-b.total_amount-s.transport_amount-b.transport_amount-s.warehouse_amount-b.warehouse_amount -s.stevedorage-b.stevedorage-s.delivery_fee-b.delivery_fee )/10000, 2 ) grossProfit, ROUND( sum( (s.total_amount-b.total_amount)/1.13 - (b.transport_amount+s.transport_amount)/1.09 - (b.warehouse_amount+b.delivery_fee+b.stevedorage+s.warehouse_amount+s.delivery_fee+s.stevedorage)/1.06 - ( (s.total_amount-b.total_amount)/1.13*0.13 - (b.transport_amount+s.transport_amount)/1.09*0.09 - (b.warehouse_amount+b.delivery_fee+b.stevedorage+s.warehouse_amount+s.delivery_fee+s.stevedorage)/1.06*0.06 - (s.total_amount*(if(s.insurance_rate is null,0,s.insurance_rate)))/1.06 )*0.12 - (s.total_amount*(if(s.insurance_rate is null,0,s.insurance_rate)))/1.06 )/10000, 2 ) netGrossProfit, ROUND( sum(s.breach_amount-s.receive_breach_amount)/10000, 2 ) noReceiveBreachAmount
from t_ctr_contract s join t_ctr_contract_settlement r on s.id = r.sell_contract_id join t_ctr_contract b on r.buy_contract_id = b.id where s.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and s.contract_status != 'C' and s.status != 'C' and b.contract_status != 'C' and b.status != 'C' and s.seal_flg = TRUE and b.seal_flg = TRUE
and s.dept_id in
#{deptIdList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and date_format(s.seal_date, '%Y-%m') in
#{eighteenMonthList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
group by date_format(s.seal_date, '%Y-%m') order by s.seal_date
